title: Coolers
heading: COOLER
description: There’s nothing better than some cool comfort after a hard day’s work. Or some fresh breeze on hot and dry days. Now get everything you wished for, at the electricity cost of operating a fan… cool, isnt’t it? Presenting Polycab innovation range of air coolers! Designed for maximum cooling and any kind of space, it ushers in natural, healthy air; is easy to move and operate, and pocket friendly too. Bring home a Polycab air cooler; bring home a cool friend for life.

title: Dry Iron
heading: Dry Iron
description: At Polycab, our mission is to connect India to a better tomorrow. We have an enduring presence in millions of homes and our latest lineup of steam irons are a shining example of the same. Our steam iron can flatten out stubborn creases very quickly, whatever the fabric. Its innovative features make fatigue-free ironing a reality, churning out crisp clothes, day after day. Bring home this smooth operator and get ready to experience the next level of ironing.

description: Annealed plain flexible copper conductor, PVC insulated, PVC sheathed 1100V cable.

POLYCAB 450/750V H07RN8-F heavy-duty water resistant cable insulated and sheathed with cross-linked elastomeric compound. description: Flexible stranded copper conductor, Low smoke zero halogen free XLPO insulation,laid up, inner sheath, ATC wire braiding, Thermoplastic polyolefin (Type TPO) sheathed.

0/6/1 kv or 2kv Flexible stranded copper conductor, Low smoke zero halogen free XLPO insulation,laid up, inner sheath, ATC wire braiding, Thermoplastic polyolefin (Type TPO) sheathed. POLYCAB HYDRO cables are designed to use in corrosive environments like Off-Shore & On-Shore oil rigs, Petrochemicals etc up to the voltage 2 kV. These cables can be installed in direct burial as well as in hazardous location.

description: Stranded compact aluminium conductor with THHN/THWN-2 insulation, accompanied with grounding conductor, sunlight resistant PVC jacketed cable.

POLYCAB Aluminium Type TC THHN/THWN-2 cable is recommended to use in commercial as well as industrial application as power, control, signal, communication and lighting cable. It is suitable to install in cable tray and also in open air, raceway, channel, conduit and duct..

heading: Polycab AL type TC XHHW-2 Cable 600V

POLYCAB Aluminium Type TC XHHW-2 cable is recommended to use in commercial as well as industrial application as power, control, signal, communication and lighting cable. It is suitable to install in cable tray and also in open air, raceway, channel, conduit and duct.

heading: Polycab Cu Type TC/TC-ER AWG Tray Cable
description: Solid or stranded copper conductor with THHN/THWN-2 insulated, flame retardant sunlight resistant PVC jacketed cable.

POLYCAB Copper Type TC/TC-ER* THHN/THWN-2 tray cable is recommended to use in commercial as well as industrial application as control, lighting and branch circuit. It is suitable to install in cable tray; also in open air, raceway, channel, conduit and duct.

title: Polycab Cu Type TC/TC-ER Tray Cable
breadcrumbs: International Standards Polycab Cu Type TC/TC-ER Tray Cable
heading: Polycab Cu Type TC/TC-ER Tray Cable
description: Class B stranded annealed plain copper conductor accompanied with class B grounding conductor, THHN/THWN-2 insulated and PVC sheathed cable.

POLYCAB Copper Type TC/TC-ER THHN/THWN-2 tray cable is recommended to use in commercial as well as industrial applications as power, control, signal, communication, and lighting cable. It is suitable to install in cable tray and also in open air, raceway, channel, conduit and duct. Further, it may be installed in direct burial or sunlight exposed area and also in wet or dry location or in area exposed to chemical or oil.

title: Polycab Cu Type TC/TC-ER XHHW-2 Tray Cable
heading: Polycab Cu Type TC/TC-ER Tray Cable
description: Stranded tinned copper conductor with XHHW-2 insulation accompanied with stranded bare plain copper grounding conductor and sunlight resistant PVC jacketed cable

POLYCAB Copper Type TC/TC-ER XHHW-2 tray cable is recommended to use in commercial as well as industrial application as power, control, signal, communication and lighting cable. It is suitable to install in cable tray and also in open air, raceway, channel, conduit and duct. Further, it may be installed in direct burial or sunlight exposed area and also in wet or dry location or in area exposed to chemical or oil.

title: Polycab Al XHHW-2 Type MC AL Armoured PVC Jacket UL 1569 600V
heading: Polycab Al XHHW-2 Type MC AL Armoured PVC Jacket UL 1569 600V
description: Stranded compact aluminium conductor with THHN or XHHW insulation, green insulated grounding conductor, interlocking aluminium armour over the assembly with PVC jacketed cable.

POLYCAB AL XHHW-2 Type MC Aluminium armour PVC jacketed cable is recommended to use in commercial, residential, industrial as well as non-patient care area of health care facilities (NEC 517.12) as power, control, signal and lighting cable. It is suitable to use in theatre, audience area of motion pictures, television studio and similar location (NEC 520.5) also it is allowable in assembly occupancies (NEC 518.4). It can be used as branch circuits to swimming pool, hot tub and spa application as per NEC 680.14 and 330.12(2)(a) and (b); in Class I Div. 2, Class II Div. 2 and Class III Div. 1 hazardous locations.

title: Polycab Cu XHHW-2 Type MC Steel Armoured PVC Jacket UL 1569 600V
breadcrumbs: International Standards Polycab Cu XHHW-2 Type MC Steel
heading: Polycab Cu XHHW-2 Type MC Steel
description: Solid or stranded copper conductor with THHN or XHHW insulation, green insulated grounding conductor, galvanised steel interlocking armour over the assembly with PVC jacketed cable.

POLYCAB Copper XHHW-2 Type MC Steel armour PVC jacketed cable is recommended to use in commercial, residential, industrial as well as non-patient care area of health care facilities as power, control, signal and lighting cable. It is suitable to use in theatre, audience area of motion pictures, television studio and similar location (NEC 520.5) and also in assembly occupancies (NEC 518.4). It can be used as branch circuits to swimming pool, hot tub and spa application as per NEC 680.14 and 330.12(2)(a) and (b); also in Class 1 div 2, class 2 div 2 and class 3 div 1 hazardous locations. It is suitable to install in cable tray (NEC 392) and also in open air, raceway, channel, conduit and duct and also as arial cable on messenger.

title: Polycab Type MC AL Conductor UL 1569 600V
heading: Polycab Type MC AL Conductor UL
description: Stranded compact Aluminium alloy conductor with THHN or XHHW insulation accompanied with bare grounding conductor, aluminium interlocking armour over the assembly.

Polycab Type MC Al Conductor 600V, THHN or XHHW insulation accompanied with bare grounding conductor, binder tape wrapped over the assembly and aluminium interlocking armoured cable is suitable to use in branch, feeder, and service power distribution under high ambient temperatures in commercial, industrial institutional and multi residential buildings.

title: Polycab Type MC Cu Conductor UL 1569 600V
heading: Polycab Type MC Cu Conductor UL 1569 600V
description: Solid or stranded copper conductor with THHN/THWN insulation, green insulated grounding conductor, aluminium interlocking armour over the assembly.

POLYCAB Type MC Copper Conductor 600 V Grade, THHN/THWN insulated with green insulated ground conductor, lightweight Aluminium interlocked armour cable is suitable for use in branch, feeder and service power distribution under high ambient temperatures in Industrial Park, institutional and residential buildings.

title: Polycab Type MC PVC Jacketed Cu Conductor UL 1569 600V
heading: Polycab Type MC PVC Jacketed Cu Conductor UL 1569 600V
description: Solid or stranded copper conductor with THHN/THWN insulation, green insulated grounding conductor, aluminium interlocking armour over the assembly with PVC jacketed cable.

POLYCAB Type MC PVC Jacketed Copper Conductor 600 V Grade, THHN/THWN insulated with green insulated ground conductor, lightweight Aluminium interlocked armour and PVC jacketed cable is suitable for use in dry as well as in wet location. It can be used as direct burried, embedded in concrete or plaster and in branch, feeder, and service power distribution under high ambient temperatures in Industrial park, institutional and residential buildings.

title: Polycab Type MC PVC Jacketed AL Conductor UL 1569 600V
breadcrumbs: International Standards Polycab Type MC PVC Jacketed
heading: Polycab Type MC PVC Jacketed
description: Polycab Type MC Al Conductor 600V, THHN or XHHW insulation accompanied with bare grounding conductor, binder tape wrapped over the assembly and aluminium interlocking armoured and PVC jacketed cable is suitable to use in branch, feeder, and service power distribution under high ambient temperatures in commercial, industrial institutional and multi residential buildings.

title: Polycab Hydro Type TC-ER/ITC-ER CIC-TC(Type P-OS)
heading: Polycab Hydro Type TC-ER/ITC-ER CIC-TC(Type P-OS)
description: Class B stranded annealed plain copper conductor, crosslinked Polyethylene insulated pairs/triads, overall Aluminium mylar shielded, PVC jacketed Marine cable.

Polycab Hydro cables are designed to use in corrosive environments like Off-Shore & On-Shore oil rigs, Petrochemicals etc on class 1 Remote control Signalling Circuits up to 600 V. These cables can be used in wet and dry area either indoor or Outdoor location in cable trays or in raceways supported by a messenger wire.

title: Polycab Hydro Type TC-ER/ITC-ER CIC-TC(Type SP-OS)
heading: Polycab Hydro Type TC-ER/ITC-ER CIC-TC(Type SP-OS)
description: Class B stranded annealed plain copper conductor, crosslinked Polyethylene insulated pairs/triads, individual and overall Aluminium mylar shielded, PVC jacketed Marine cable.

Polycab Hydro cables are designed to use in corrosive environments like Off-Shore & On-Shore oil rigs, Petrochemicals etc on class 1 Remote control Signalling Circuits up to 600 V. These cables can be used in wet and dry area either indoor or Outdoor location in cable trays or in raceways supported by a messenger wire.

title: Polycab AL XHHW-2 UL 44 600V
breadcrumbs: International Standards Polycab AL XHHW-2 UL 44 600V
heading: Polycab AL XHHW-2 UL 44 600V
description: Single core Aluminium alloy, Crosslinked polyolefin insulated cable.

POLYCAB AL XHHW/XHHW-2, cable with AA8000 series aluminium alloy conductor, cross linked polyolefin insulation is intended to use in conduit and cable trays for services, feeders, and branch circuits in commercial or industrial application as specified in National Electrical Code 2011. Type XHHW is suitable to use in dry location with ambient temperature not exceeding 90°C or in wet location not exceeding 75°C and Type XHHW-2 is suitable to use in wet or dry location with ambient temperature not exceeding 90°C, suitable to use in healthcare facilities.

title: Polycab Cu XHHW-2 UL 44 600V
breadcrumbs: International Standards Polycab Cu XHHW-2 UL 44 600V
heading: Polycab Cu XHHW-2 UL 44 600V
description: POLYCAB Cu XHHW/XHHW-2, cable with solid or stranded copper conductor, cross linked Polyolefin insulation is intended to use in conduit and cable trays for services, feeders, and branch circuits in commercial or industrial application as specified in National Electrical Code 2011. Type XHHW is suitable to use in dry location with ambient temperature not exceeding 90°C or in wet location not exceeding 75°C and Type XHHW-2 is suitable to use in wet or dry location with ambient temperature not exceeding 90°C, suitable to use in healthcare facilities.

title: Polycab AL Solar UL 4703 2000V AC
breadcrumbs: International Standards Polycab AL Solar UL 4703 2000V AC
heading: Polycab AL Solar UL 4703 2000V AC
description: Single core Aluminium alloy, Crosslinked polyolefin insulated cable

POLYCAB PV halogen free flame-retardant Aluminium Alloy conductor E-Beam crosslinked Polyolefins insulated Wire is designed to use in Outdoor Solar application as per NEC 690 in wet & dry location. The cable is rated direct burial, Sunlight resistant and weatherproof.

title: Polycab Cu Solar UL 4703 2000V AC
breadcrumbs: International Standards Polycab Cu Solar UL 4703 2000V AC
heading: Polycab Cu Solar UL 4703 2000V AC
description: Single core copper, Crosslinked polyolefin insulated cable.

POLYCAB PV halogen free flame-retardant Copper conductor, E-Beam crosslinked Polyolefins insulated Wire is designed to use in Outdoor Solar application as per NEC 690 in wet & dry location. The cable is rated direct burial, Sunlight resistant and weatherproof.

title: Polycab UFB Cable UL 493 600V
breadcrumbs: International Standards Polycab UFB Cable UL 493 600V
heading: Polycab UFB Cable UL 493 600V
description: Solid or stranded copper conductor with THHN/THWN-2 insulation, bare grounding conductor and PVC sheathed flat cable.

POLYCAB Type UF-B stranded copper conductor THHN/THWN-2 insulated and PVC sheathed cable is suitable to use as underground feeder and branch circuit wiring in wet, dry & corrosive location as specified in NEC article no 340. It may also be used as feeder to outside post lamps, pumps and other equipment.

title: Polycab Flexible Cords Type SJO UL 62 300V AC
breadcrumbs: International Standards Polycab Flexible Cords Type SJO UL 62 300V AC
heading: Polycab Flexible Cords Type SJO UL 62 300V AC
description: Flexible copper conductor EPR insulated and CPE sheathed cable

POLYCAB Type SJO, EPR insulated, CPE Jacketed portable cable is extremely flexible, resistant to oil, moisture, and abrasion, makes it suitable for outdoor or indoor application. These types of cables are used to supply low voltage power to small motor of portable tools in maintenance shops, vacuum cleaners, office machines, outdoor extensions and where severe operating conditions exist.

title: Polycab Flexible Cords Type SJOOW UL 62 300V
breadcrumbs: International Standards Polycab Flexible Cords Type SJOOW UL 62 300V
heading: Polycab Flexible Cords Type SJOOW UL 62 300V
description: Flexible copper conductor with EPDM insulated and CPE sheathed cable

POLYCAB Type SJOOW, moisture and oil resistant EPDM rubber insulated, and heat, moisture and oil resistant flexible CPE jacketed cable is designed for hard usage on industrial equipment, heavy tools, battery chargers, portable lights welding leads, marine dockside power, power extension and mining applications.

title: Polycab Flexible Cords Type SJT/HO3VV-F UL 62 300V AC
breadcrumbs: International Standards Polycab Flexible Cords Type SJT/HO3VV-F UL 62 300V AC
heading: Polycab Flexible Cords Type SJT/HO3VV-F UL 62 300V AC
description: Flexible copper conductor with PVC insulated and PVC jacketed cable.

POLYCAB Type SJT/H03VV-F, PVC insulated, PVC Jacketed flexible cable are suitable to use for home appliances viz: vacuum cleaners, refrigerators, washing machine and small appliances where mechanical stress is low. These cables are suitable to use in wet and damp areas.

title: Polycab Flexible Cords Type SOOW UL 62 600V
breadcrumbs: International Standards Polycab Flexible Cords Type SOOW UL 62 600V
heading: Polycab Flexible Cords Type SOOW UL 62 600V
description: Flexible copper conductor with EPDM insulated and CPE sheathed cable.

POLYCAB Type SOOW, EPDM rubber insulated heat, moisture and oil resistant flexible CPE jacket cable is designed for extra hard usage on industrial equipment, heavy tools, battery chargers, portable lights welding leads, marine dockside power, power extension and mining applications.

title: Polycab NMB Cable UL 719 600V
breadcrumbs: International Standards Polycab NMB Cable UL 719 600V
heading: Polycab NMB Cable UL 719 600V
description: Solid or stranded copper conductor with THHN/THWN-2 insulation, copper grounding conductor between two insulated core wrapped with flame retrdant paper and PVC sheathed flat cable.

POLYCAB Type NM-B (Non-Metallic sheath cable) is suitable to use in indoor residential wiring including branch circuit for luminaries, outlets and switches. It may be installed in both exposed and concealed work where such area is not subjected to excessive moisture or dampness.

title: Polycab THHN AL UL 83 600V
breadcrumbs: International Standards Polycab THHN AL UL 83 600V
heading: Polycab THHN AL UL 83 600V
description: Single core aluminium, PVC insulated and Nylon jacketed cable.

POLYCAB Aluminium THHN/THWN-2, cable with AA8000 series aluminium conductor, thermoplastic insulation/Nylon sheath is intended to use in conduit and cable trays for services and branch circuits in commercial or industrial application as specified in National Electrical Code 2011. Type THHN or T90 Nylon is suitable to use in dry location with ambient temperature not exceeding 90°C. Type THWN-2 or TWN75 is suitable to use in wet or dry location with ambient temperature not exceeding 90°C or not to exceed 75°C when exposed to oil or coolant.

title: Polycab THHN Cu UL 83 600V
breadcrumbs: International Standards Polycab THHN Cu UL 83 600V
heading: Polycab THHN Cu UL 83 600V

heading: Polycab AL SE style R UL 854 600V
description: Two core Aluminium conductor along with bare ground conductor, XHHW or THHN insulated, Overall reinforced with tape and PVC sheathed cable.

POLYCAB Aluminium SE Style R cable is recommended to use in transmitting power from service point to the meter and to the distribution panel board. Further, it is applicable to all type of SE cable requirements. SER may be used in wet or dry locations above the ground at ambient temperature not to exceed 90°C.

POLYCAB Aluminium SE Style U is recommended to use in transmitting power from service point to the meter and to the distribution panel board. description: Flexible Tinned copper, EPR Type IE2 insulated, Elastomeric Type Chlorinated polyethylene (CPE) sheathed 1100V rubber cable.

POLYCAB RR-E MC, IS 9968-1 tinned copper conductor, EPR insulated and CPE sheathed cable conforming to IS 9968-1 is designed to use for fixed wiring, single phase or three phase (earthed or unearthed) system for rated voltage up to and including 1100 V. These cables may be used on DC system for rated voltage grade 1500 V to earth. Suitable to use in elevator, lifts, cranes, mines, heater leads and electric iron leads.

title: Switchgears
heading: ACCL
description: Polycab Automatic Changeover with Current Limiter (ACCL) is a fully automatic high precision micro-controller based system designed to provide power to critical loads where a backup generator is located, so that the generator may provide temporary electrical power if utility supply fails. It’s ideally suited for conservation of energy of standby Generators used in multistoried apartments, commercial complexes, industrial establishments, etc through limiting the current..

title: Switchgears
heading: ISOLATOR
description: Polycab Isolators can be used as a main switch in wide variety of applications. These isolators are tested according to IEC / EN 60947-3 standards and fulfill the requirements for isolation function.Utilization category ensures possibility of switching mixed resistive and inductive loads with low overloads. Isolators are produced in modular design with width one module unit for all versions up to 4-pole.

title: Switchgears
heading: MCB CHANGEOVER SWITCH
description: Polycab MCB Changeover Switch is a manual operated changeover switch which finds its application in switching load between two power supplies. MCB Changeover switch finds wide applications in industries as well as in domestic area specially in Individual Bungalow(IB) for use in low voltage distribution circuits, wherever continuity of supply is necessary. It is used for switching to an alternate source of supply from main supply and vice – versa. The changeover switch comes in 2P and 4P versions, for single and three phase application respectively. It has three positions ( I-O-II) with centre-off. They are switch disconnectors with independent manual operation, capable of making, carrying and breaking currents under normal circuit conditions.

title: Switchgears
heading: MCB
description: Miniature Circuit Breakers are electromechanical devices which protect an electrical circuit from an overcurrent. The overcurrent, in an electrical circuit, may result from short circuit, overload or faulty design. A MCB is a better alternative to a fuse since it does not require replacement, once an overload is detected. Unlike fuse, a MCB can be easily reset and thus offers improved operational safety and greater convenience without incurring large operating cost.

title: Switchgears
heading: RCBO
description: Polycab Poly shield RCBO is a single composite device which provides protection against over currents, short- circuit and earth leakage faults, it comes in the same width and profile as that of a standard MCB. It is designed for use in domestic, commercial and industrial distribution systems at the most downstream circuit for ensuring high degree of protection to the user.

title: Switchgears
heading: RCCB
description: Polyshield’s Residual Current circuit breaker for earth leakage protection. It is to be used in association with miniature circuit breakers, its function is to detect earth leakage current and open the connected circuit to protect people and equipment. These devices are designed to meet the Earth Leakage Protection Standards of the IEC: IEC/EN 61008-1,IS-12640-1.
